articles.title: Thorchain Attack Drains Protocol of Estimated $7.6 Million
articles.description: The blockchain protocol has paused the network to deal with the attack.

articles.title: Binance Smart Chain (BSC) Was the Most Used Blockchain in Q2, 2021
articles.description: The Binance Smart Chain led the rest in unique active wallets in Q2, averaging 421k Dapps on the Binance Smart Chain continue to grow, hitting 1,464 by the end of Q2 PancakeSwap is the top protocol on the Binance Smart Chain driving 28% of BSC’s total value locked PancakeSwap is also the most used Dapp across all blockchains Gaming and NFTs are slowly gaining traction on the Binance Smart Chain...

articles.title: Huobi Loses 64% of Revenue and 500 Million in USDT Reserves Due to Regulatory Pressure
articles.description: Data shared by insider Colin Wu shows that Huobi has been suffering from regulatory pressure in China and has faced big losses over it

articles.title: Hong Kong raid uncovers suspected US$155M crypto laundering scheme
articles.description: Tether stablecoins linked to funds funneled to banks in Singapore and elsewhere amid worldwide cryptocurrency crime increase.

articles.title: Axie Infinity Surges 32%, Other Crypto Gaming Tokens Follow
articles.description: Tokens associated with gaming and NFT-focused blockchain platforms are seeing double-digit gains today.

articles.title: Zilliqa Upgraded to Fix Memory Issue Caused By Large Smart Contracts
articles.description: Zilliqa’s mainnet was upgraded to fix an issue that was causing mining nodes to run out of memory Zilliqa’s mainnet and testnet had gone down a day earlier when the same nodes run out of memory while processing large smart contracts The team at Zilliqa has thanked its community for understanding the challenges of cutting-edge innovations that have been implemented in the project Yesterday,...

articles.title: Bitcoin Struggles At $32K: AXS With Another 40% Daily Spike (Market Watch)
articles.description: Bitcoin continues to struggle in a range of around $32K. On the flip side, Axie Infinity's AXS is up 40% daily, marking yet another all-time high.

articles.title: Crypto derivatives exchange Bybit launches spot trading, including for XRP
articles.description: Bybit, one of the largest crypto derivatives exchanges, has expanded into the crypto spot trading market.
